title: React Context API Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of prop drilling, context providers, and the useContext hook.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary problem that the Context API solves in React?
options: Prop drilling (passing props through many levels).

questions.question: Which built-in React function should you use to create a new Context object?
What is the role of the Provider in the Context API?
options: To fetch data from an API and provide it.
To wrap the component tree and pass down a 'value' prop to all its descendants.
To define the state of the parent component.
To return the final JSX of the application.

questions.question: Which hook can be used inside a functional component to read the current value of a Context Provider?
Does every consumer component need to be directly inside a Provider element for the Context to work?
options: No, they only need to be descendants of a component wrapped in a Provider.
Yes, but only in older versions of React.
